articles.title: Educators balk as Merrimack, Suffolk plan to roll out 3-year bachelor’s degrees
articles.description:
Supporters say students will save time and money, while critics argue shorter programs could come at the expense of a well-rounded education.

The post Educators balk as Merrimack, Suffolk plan to roll out 3-year bachelor’s degrees appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Merrimack and Suffolk universities plan to introduce 3-year bachelor's degrees starting in 2026.
Supporters claim students could save up to 25% on tuition costs with accelerated programs.
Critics warn that shortened degrees may compromise educational quality for Boston residents.

articles.title: HGTV’s Taniya Nayak talks designing a Bruin’s home and new Boston restaurants
articles.description:
Nayak hosted HGTV's "Rock the Block" with Drew Lachey of 98 Degrees.

The post HGTV’s Taniya Nayak talks designing a Bruin’s home and new Boston restaurants appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Taniya Nayak discussed designing a Bruins-themed home for local fans in Boston.
Nayak co-hosted HGTV's 'Rock the Block' with Drew Lachey, enhancing local visibility.
New restaurant openings in Boston aim to boost the local dining scene and economy.
